name: Xiangtan Electric Manufacturing Co. Ltd.
summary: Xiangtan Electric Manufacturing Co. Ltd. manufactures and sells electrical products in China and internationally. The company offers AC and DC motors, urban rail transit equipment, industrial water pump, electric control equipment, electric vehicle drive system, and ship electric propulsion system, as well as wind turbine products. It serves defense, electric power, energy, mining, transportation, chemical, light, water conservancy, and other construction industries. Xiangtan Electric Manufacturing Co. Ltd. was founded in 1936 and is based in Xiangtan, China.
